description: Shared AI/agent classes — used by aic.sh, cwm-architect, and any application that works with agents, tasks, prompts, decisions.

classes.name: AI Agent
classes.description: WHO the agent is — identity, prompt, domain, tools. Runtime behavior in ai:agent_behavior via behavior prop.

classes.name: Task
classes.description: An actionable work item — assigned to agents, tracked through lifecycle.

classes.name: Prompt
classes.description: A reusable prompt template with variable substitution.

classes.name: Decision
classes.description: A recorded decision with rationale and assignment.

classes.name: Preference
classes.description: A learned preference rule. Confidence grows with confirmation.

classes.name: Round
classes.description: An execution round — one cycle of agents running sequentially.

classes.name: AI Tool
classes.description: Tool that can be assigned to agents — binds to ElementStore classes and actions

props.description: Class+action bindings. Each entry: { type: 'class'|'class_action', ref_class_id: string, actions?: string[], action?: string, params?: object }

classes.name: AI Memory
classes.description: Persistent memory entry — generic data field for AI to store anything

props.description: Generic data payload — AI stores whatever it needs

classes.name: Debug Entry
classes.description: Real-time debug trace entry — fire-and-forget via WebSocket, not persisted

props.description: Step payload — provider, tokens, params, results, errors

classes.name: AI Job
classes.description: Scheduled or triggered job — schema, events, and execution rules declared in object

classes.name: Character
classes.description: Visual character with reactions for agent behavior

classes.name: LLM Configuration
classes.description: LLM provider configuration with API keys

classes.name: Message Chunk
classes.description: Embedded chunk within ai:message — not independently stored

classes.name: Prompt Request
classes.description: Generic user-input request from AI — rendered as inline widget in conversation. Types: confirm, alert, password, number, text, options

props.description: Unique request ID for matching response
Pre-filled value or default option index
Type-specific validation: { min, max, integer, pattern, minLength, maxLength, required }

classes.name: Prompt Response
classes.description: User response to an ai:prompt-request — includes confirm token for backend verification

props.description: User answer (stringified): true/false for confirm, number string, selected index, free text
Verification token: { timestamp: number, session_token: string }

classes.name: AI Conversation
classes.description: A thread between participants. Messages ordered by created timestamp. Linked to project, task, agent.

classes.name: AI Message
classes.description: Universal message in the pool. One message can produce multiple results (questions, decisions, tasks, findings, approvals).

props.description: Person who sent this (server-set from JWT, or system for AI)
Agents that should act on this
Array of results — each has result_type + type-specific fields. One message can produce multiple questions, decisions, tasks, etc.

classes.name: Agent Behavior
classes.description: Runtime behavior config — session, triggers, approval, cooldown, budget

props.description: fresh=new each run, persistent=keep alive, timed=keep for session_ttl
Actions needing approval: code_changes, decisions, task_creation
When to run: round, task_assigned, question_received, schedule
What to do on agent failure

classes.name: Question
classes.description: Agent question directed to agents or owner

classes.name: Agent Session
classes.description: A session belonging to an agent — type identifies the runtime (claude, openai, etc.)

props.description: External session ID (e.g. claude CLI session ID)

classes.name: Question Result
classes.description: Result shape when result_type=question

props.description: Role title: owner, all, security, etc.

classes.name: Decision Result
classes.description: Result shape when result_type=decision

classes.name: Task Result
classes.description: Result shape when result_type=task

classes.name: Finding Result
classes.description: Result shape when result_type=finding

classes.name: Approval Result
classes.description: Result shape when result_type=approval

props.description: ID of the message/question being approved

classes.name: Prompt Proposal
classes.description: Agent-proposed improvement to a prompt file. Goes through CEO approval before being applied.

props.description: Which agent is proposing the improvement
The text to append to the prompt
